purpose: Provides deterministic cryptographic test vectors for HPP receipt and ledger entry canonical string construction, hashing, and signature verification.
stability_statement: This file represents a stable MVP reference for receipt and ledger signing.
timestamp_semantics: All timestamps are UNIX epoch seconds in UTC.
negative_test_vectors_note: Any single-byte change in canonical_string MUST cause verification failure. See receipt_v1_negative_example_01.
verification_procedure: Reconstruct the canonical string from structured fields using UTF-8, LF newlines, fixed field order, and a final newline.
Compute SHA-256 over the canonical string bytes.
Compare the resulting digest to the sha256.hex and sha256.base64 values in the vector.
Verify the Ed25519 signature over the 32-byte SHA-256 digest using the referenced public key.

key_management_notes.test_keys_only: All keys in this file are for testing only and MUST NOT be used in production.
key_management_notes.production_requirement: Production systems must generate and use unique verifier keypairs.
key_management_notes.key_id_resolution: key_id values map to entries in a trusted public key registry maintained by the verifier.

notes: All canonical strings use UTF-8, LF newlines, fixed field order, and include a final newline.
sha256 is computed over the canonical string bytes.
ed25519 signatures in this file are computed over the 32-byte sha256 digest, not over the raw canonical string.
